date_notes: Strike began Oct 6. R-009 (publication date Oct 3) reports on impending dispute — source date and event date differ here.
title_fr: Les enseignants de l'Alberta déclenchent une grève provinciale
description_en: Teachers begin a province-wide strike over class size, complexity and compensation — the first province-wide teachers' strike in Alberta in decades.

relations.note: Strike begins following 89.5% rejection vote (EVT-040) and 94.5% strike authorization (EVT-041).

verification_notes: Strike-start date (Oct 6) confirmed in R-009 body ('walked off the job on Oct. 6'). R-009's primary focus is the later refusal-of-mediation development, but the start date is stated. 'First in decades' framing implied (2002 reference) — do not assert as fact without a dedicated source.
